description: A wide panoramic seascape painting showing a coastal scene at sunset. A dramatic rocky promontory with a castle or fortress rises on the left. On the beach, small groups of figures are gathered near fishing boats and equipment. The sky is spectacular with clouds lit by the setting sun in shades of pink, gold, and turquoise. Sailing vessels are visible in the calm harbor waters. The overall composition captures the beauty and tranquility of a Mediterranean coastal evening.
